strengths: 13+ years building full-stack systems across Node.js, TypeScript, and React
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development from RIDE Capital
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume or projects
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older (robotic arms at Altom, 2016-2018)
Vitest not named explicitly, though Jest-era testing frameworks are implied

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience

response.justification: Candidate matches the core competencies: 6+ years full-stack (well exceeded), TypeScript/Node.js/React proficiency (Optilyz, re:cinq), databases (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes via GISCollective), Git, and notably AI-agent development (MCP generators at re:cinq) which is a specifically required skill. Engineering rigor is evidenced by TDD/CI/CD practice at RIDE Capital and authored testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial). Gaps: no Nest.js mentioned, Kotlin absent, and Vitest not explicitly named — though these are learnable given the demonstrated polyglot adaptability across DLang, Java, C++, and Swift.
